name: Jim Jefferies
blurb: After establishing himself on the UK circuit in the early 2000s, he moved to the United States and built a major international following through Netflix specials.
bio: Jim Jefferies is an Australian-born stand-up comedian, actor and writer known for blunt, confessional material on topics including alcohol, religion, relationships and gun control. After establishing himself on the UK circuit in the early 2000s, he moved to the United States and built a major international following through Netflix specials. He created and starred in the FX sitcom Legit and the Comedy Central late-night programme The Jim Jefferies Show.

timeline.ev: Moves to the UK and builds a comedy-circuit name
Releases breakthrough special I Swear to God
Creates and stars in FX sitcom Legit
Netflix special BARE includes the gun-control bit
Launches The Jim Jefferies Show on Comedy Central
Named Stand-up Comedian of the Year at Just for Laughs

accolades: Just for Laughs Stand-up Comedian of the Year 2019
Creator and star of FX sitcom Legit
